# SubscriptionHandle.DeclinedFields property

The boolean filter kinds the client requested but the server did NOT honor — the declined `*ListChanged` field names (§10.3). Empty when every requested kind was honored. A caller can inspect this to learn it will not receive a kind it asked for.

```csharp
public IReadOnlyList<string> DeclinedFields { get; set; }
```
